conflict_type: Conflicts between Phrase Constraints and Style Constraints
seed_instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program.
org_constraint: Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon.
new_constraint: The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
instruction: Write a thank you email to a professor after a successful internship program. Use a professional yet warm tone tailored for an academic audience, avoiding technical jargon. The email must include the phrase "The internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks."
response:
Subject: Thank You – Successful Completion of Internship Program

Dear Professor [Last Name],

I hope this email finds you well.

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude for the opportunity to participate in the recent internship program under your guidance. The experience has been incredibly rewarding, and I am deeply appreciative of the time, mentorship, and support you provided throughout the duration of the project.

Working within your team allowed me to engage with complex challenges in a collaborative environment. I am particularly proud to say that the internship significantly enhanced my proficiency in utilizing advanced algorithmic paradigms and computational frameworks. This growth has not only strengthened my technical skills but also deepened my understanding of how theoretical concepts translate into practical solutions.

Your ability to foster a supportive yet challenging atmosphere made a profound difference in my professional development. I have learned valuable lessons about problem-solving, teamwork, and academic rigor that I will carry forward in my future studies and career.

Thank you again for your generosity and leadership. I would be honored to stay in touch and hope to cross paths with you again in the future.

Warm regards,

[Your Full Name]  
[Your Degree Program, e.g., Master of Science in Computer Science]  
[Your Contact Information]
